_meta.method: Move names are taken from framedata_meta.lua (Grouflon/3rd_training_lua) where that file annotates the ROM pointer (name_source=metadata, AUTHORITATIVE). Pointers it does not annotate fall back to timing/geometry inference against community frame data (name_source=inferred, a guess). Box geometry + timing remain ROM-verified in all cases.

CROUCH_LIGHT_PUNCH.rationale: framedata_meta.lua GOUKI: "1d28e" -- Cr LP  (meta typo; 1d28 is the present pointer)

CROUCH_MEDIUM_KICK.rationale: framedata_meta.lua GOUKI: "2008" -- Cr MK  (corrects prior guess 2008/CrHK)

CROUCH_HEAVY_KICK.rationale: framedata_meta.lua GOUKI: "20d8" -- Cr HK  (corrects prior guess 2008)

HEAVY_PUNCH.rationale: tallest non-moving box, s/a/r approx 5/5/25; NOT annotated in framedata_meta.lua

MEDIUM_KICK.rationale: longer-reach non-moving kick, s/a/r approx 5/4/13; NOT annotated in framedata_meta.lua

HEAVY_KICK.rationale: longest reach, big, s/a/r approx 8/5/25; NOT annotated in framedata_meta.lua
